repos.description: SyncLayer (bun) is humanlayer's primary closed-source monorepo for all our products and cloud. The riptide-daemon in particular drives the agentlayer repos' agents/codelayer Codelayer agent
agentlayer (bun) - HumanLayer's legacy agent SDK, agents/codelayer is HumanLayer's current agent
clanka (pnpm) - Effectful Technologies's experimental coding agent library
pi (npm) - reference, checkout only - minimal open-source headless coding agent monorepo with core, tui, sdk, etc
opencode (bun) — reference, checkout only; open-source coding agent
effect-smol (pnpm) — reference, checkout only - effect v4 source code
